<<Education of Abdul Kadir Khan>>  
Abdul Kadir Khan studied at a local school in his hometown. He learned basic subjects like math, science, and literature. His teachers were kind and encouraged his curiosity. He also read many books on history and philosophy. His family supported his education and helped him grow. He later attended a university to expand his knowledge. His journey in learning was steady and full of effort. He always aimed to improve and gain more skills. His dedication to education shaped his future.
